subcodes.first_line: O My servant! Hear thou My call from the heaven of My loving-kindness, then from the right hand of the Throne of My grandeur, that verily I am the Grief-Stricken One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا غلامی اسمع ندائی من سماء عنایتی ثم عن یمین عرش عظمتی بانی انا المحزون
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @development of capacity and readiness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
